nodes.name: Cron 21:00 KL
nodes.notes: Daily at 21:00 Asia/Kuala_Lumpur. Dinner deliveries are done by 19:00 so all of today's orders are settled by 21:00. Set timezone in n8n global settings (Settings → General → Timezone) OR on this node's Trigger Timezone, else cron runs in UTC.

nodes.name: Fetch Daily Recap
nodes.notes: Reuses the same N8N API Key Header Auth credential as the daily-prep workflow. IMPORTANT: hit www.incredibowl.my (not incredibowl.my) — apex 307-redirects and drops Authorization across the hop.

nodes.name: Build Meta Payload
nodes.notes: Builds Meta Cloud API payload for the daily_recap_boss template. Template body has 6 parameters: {{1}}=date, {{2}}=todaySummary, {{3}}=voucherSalesSummary, {{4}}=customerSummary, {{5}}=tomorrowSummary, {{6}}=tomorrowCriticalNotesText.

nodes.name: Send WhatsApp Template
nodes.notes: Raw HTTP POST to Meta Cloud API. Reuses the Incredibowl WhatsApp Token credential created for daily-prep. Phone Number ID must be the same WABA's prod phone (otherwise #132001 template-not-exist).

nodes.name: Log Error
nodes.notes: Catch-all error logger. Same as daily-prep — currently only writes to n8n execution logs. Swap for Slack/Email/Telegram node when health-alert work is done.
